title: Grand Canyon
description: Datapack built using Atlas which makes the Overworld the Grand Canyon using real-life height data.
body:
Datapack built using Atlas which makes the Overworld the Grand Canyon using real-life height data. Check out the gallery to see some stunning screenshots I took of it!

Some things to note:
- It must be first in datapack loading order
- The world is not infinite, this one has a size of around 7k by 4k
- Terralith is required
- Atlas is also required

Special thanks to my friends at Stardust Labs for Terralith's biomes!
